prompt.title: What’s your name?
prompt.subtitle: Shown to others in the room. No account needed.
prompt.label: Display name

home.activeRoomHint: To start fresh, leave your current room first.

create.title: Create a Room
create.errorCreate: Failed to create the room. Please try again.
create.errorAlreadyInRoom: You’re already in a room. Leave it first to create a new one.

join.title: Join a Room
join.errorNotFound: Room not found. Check the code and try again.
join.errorJoin: Couldn’t join the room. Please try again.
join.errorAlreadyInRoom: You’re already in a room. Leave it first to join a new one.

room.title: Room
room.waitingForHost: Waiting for the host to start…
room.errorNotFoundSubtitle: The link may have expired or the room was closed. Start a new game instead.
room.shareText: Use code {{code}} or tap the link to join.
room.startDisabledNotAllReady: Waiting for all players to be ready
room.startDisabledTooFew: Need at least {{count}} players to start
room.leaveError: Couldn’t leave the room. Please try again.
room.roomEndedSubtitle: The host ended the room. Thanks for playing!
room.hostLeaveSubtitle: Choose a player to hand over to, or end the room for everyone.
room.hostLeaveAloneSubtitle: You’re the only player. Ending the room will close it for everyone.
room.hostLeaveError: Couldn’t update the room. Please try again.
room.startErrorNotHost: You’re not the host of this room.
room.startErrorGeneric: Couldn’t start the round. Please try again.
room.roundActiveSubtitle: Flip your card to see your role.

round.imposterHint: Find the word everyone else knows.
round.neutralSubtitle: Talk it out. Who's the imposter?
round.waitingForAllSeen: Waiting for all players to peek…
round.endGameError: Couldn’t end the game. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: This room may have ended, or the link is wrong.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.placeholder: Full privacy policy coming soon. Quack collects no personal data and stores nothing beyond your chosen display name in your browser.
